items.title: Lebanon says Hezbollah agrees reciprocal halt to attacks on Israel

items.title: Bowen: Trump needs this war to end but Iran is not backing down
items.summary: Under pressure from the polls and Gulf allies, the White House is pushing for a deal but Iran wants concessions, writes BBC's international editor.

items.title: Massive overnight Russian strikes hit Ukraine killing at least five
items.summary: Thousands of Kyiv residents ran for shelter following what officials said were ballistic missile strikes on the city centre.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 薔蜜風暴衝擊日本西南 致數萬家庭斷電與9人受傷
items.summary: 熱帶風暴薔蜜（已由颱風降級為熱帶風暴）今（2）日襲擊日本西南部，導致數萬戶家庭斷電，數百個航班停飛和9人受傷。  根據《法新社》報導，日本氣象廳警告，薔蜜在1日襲擊亞熱帶沖...…

items.title: 義大利地牛翻身！ 近海發生規模6.2地震
items.summary: 義大利南部外海於當地時間2日凌晨0點12分發生規模6.2地震，由於震央深度超過240公里，因此並無海嘯威脅。  根據《路透》報導，德國地球科學研究中心（GFZ）指出，義大利南...…
